zh.Glazebrook, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾格拉布盧可
zh.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾希布盧可

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook於1241年出生在英國爾諾維其時，他的父親Ralph de Vernon37歲，母親Cecilia Crew20歲。他於大約1281年與Mary Dacre在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年7月在英國英格蘭爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.Glazebrook, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾格拉布盧可
zh-hans.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.Davenham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾達文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook于1241年出生在英国爾諾維其时，他的父亲Ralph de Vernon37岁，母亲Cecilia Crew20岁。他于大约1281年与Mary Dacre在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年7月在英国英格兰爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook was born in 1241, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph de Vernon, was 37 and his mother, Cecilia Crew, was 20. He married Mary Dacre about 1281, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in July 1312, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook est né en 1241, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Vernon, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Crew, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mary Dacre environ 1281, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1312, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook 1241 in Northwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Vernon 37 und seine Mutter Cecilia Crew 20. Er hat um 1281 in England, United Kingdom Mary Dacre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1312 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook è nato il nel 1241 nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Vernon, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Crew, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mary Dacre circa 1281, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1312, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrookが1241年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父Ralph de Vernonは37歳，母Cecilia Crewは20歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスでMary Dacreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年7月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook(이)가 1241년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Vernon(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Crew(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mary Dacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook nasceu em 1241, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Vernon, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Crew, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Dacre aproximadamente 1281, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1312, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook родился в 1241 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Vernon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Crew, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Dacre около 1281 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер июль 1312 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook nació en 1241, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Vernon, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Cecilia Crew, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mary Dacre aproximadamente 1281, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en julio de 1312, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
